member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AIProviders.AzureOpenAISummaryProvider
member.summary: Provides summary and question-answering functionality using Azure OpenAI services.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AIProviders.AzureOpenAISummaryProvider.#ctor(System.Security.SecureString,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified API key, endpoint, and model.
member.remarks: This constructor initializes the provider and creates an internal chat client for interacting with the Azure OpenAI service. Ensure that the provided API key and endpoint are valid and have the necessary permissions to access the specified model.
member.param: The API key used to authenticate requests to the Azure OpenAI service. Cannot be null or empty.
The endpoint URL of the Azure OpenAI service. Must be a valid URI and cannot be null or empty.
The name of the OpenAI model to use for generating summaries. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AIProviders.AzureOpenAISummaryProvider.CreateChatClient
member.summary: Initializes and configures the chat client for interacting with the Azure OpenAI service.
member.remarks: This method creates an instance of the Azure OpenAI chat client using the specified endpoint, API key, and model. The resulting client is assigned to the property.

member.summary: Base class for summary providers using AI chat clients.

member.summary: Occurs when summary resources are calculated during summarization.

member.summary: Gets or sets additional instructions to be appended to the prompt for summarization or question answering.

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of tokens that can be processed. Default is 128000.

member.summary: Gets or sets the AI chat client used for summarization and question answering.

member.returns: A summary string generated by the AI model.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AIProviders.OpenAISummaryProvider
member.summary: Provides document summarization and question answering using the OpenAI API.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AIProviders.OpenAISummaryProvider.#ctor(System.Security.SecureString,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified API key and model.
member.remarks: This constructor initializes the OpenAI client and prepares it for use with the specified model. Ensure that the provided API key is valid and has the necessary permissions to access the OpenAI service.
member.param: The API key used to authenticate requests to the OpenAI service. Cannot be null or empty.
The name of the OpenAI model to use for generating summaries. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AIProviders.OpenAISummaryProvider.CreateChatClient
member.summary: Initializes and assigns a chat client instance using the specified OpenAI model and API key.
member.remarks: This method creates an instance of the OpenAI chat client and configures it with the provided model. Ensure that the key field is set to a valid OpenAI API key before calling this method.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerContainer
member.summary: Represents a container element that manages the layout and interaction between PDF viewer components including thumbnails, bookmarks, AI summary, signature panel, and the main PDF viewing area. The container provides resizable panels and navigation functionality for PDF documents.

member.summary: Defines the minimum width for the thumbnail panel when resizing.

member.summary: Creates and initializes the child elements including thumbnail list, tree view, AI summary, and sizing elements.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified PDF viewer element as the owner.
member.param: The that this container will manage.

member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum width allowed for the thumbnail panel during resizing operations.

member.summary: Gets or sets the default scale factor used for rendering thumbnail images of PDF pages.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the thumbnail panel is currently hidden from view.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the bookmarks panel is currently hidden from view.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the AI summary chat is currently hidden from view.

member.summary: Gets the control that displays the document bookmarks in a hierarchical structure.

member.summary: Gets the instance of the associated with this object.

member.summary: Updates the visibility of the AI summary button based on whether AI summary functionality is enabled in the PDF viewer.
member.remarks: Override this method to customize how the AI summary button's visibility is managed in derived classes.

member.summary: Generates and populates the thumbnail list with pages from the currently loaded PDF document.

member.returns: The actual size used by the container.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerNavigator
member.summary: Represents a command bar control that provides navigation and interaction capabilities for PDF documents. The includes buttons for opening, printing, saving documents, as well as navigation controls, zoom functionality, search features, and viewing mode options. It can be associated with a to provide a complete PDF viewing experience.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer
member.summary: Represents a control that can display and interact with PDF documents within your application. The provides comprehensive PDF viewing capabilities including zooming, scrolling, panning, and text search functionality. The control features a virtualized rendering engine to ensure optimal performance with large documents. It can be seamlessly integrated with a control to provide additional navigation features such as page thumbnails, bookmarks, and quick page selection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.ExportPage(System.Int32,System.String,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports a single PDF page to an image file on the disk.
member.param: Number of the page to export. First page has a number 1. A value of 0 means export the current page.
Full path to the output image file.
Scale factor for the exported image. Value of 1.0 represents the original size.
When true, overrides the image file if it already exists.
The image format to use when saving the image.
member.returns: Returns true if the export was successful, false if the file already exists and overrideFileIfAlreadyExist is false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.ExportPage(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports a single PDF page to a Bitmap object.
member.param: Number of the page to export. First page has a number 1. A value of 0 means export the current page.
Scale factor for the exported image. Value of 1.0 represents the original size.
When true, overrides the image file if it already exists.
The image format to use when creating the bitmap.
member.returns: Returns a Bitmap object representing the PDF page. This bitmap should be disposed manually when no longer needed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.ExportPages(System.String,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports all PDF pages to image files on the disk with sequential numbering.
member.param: Base name for the output image files. Page numbers will be appended automatically.
Scale factor for the exported images. Value of 1.0 represents the original size.
When true, overrides the image files if they already exist.
The image format to use when saving the images.
member.returns: Returns true if all exports were successful, false if any file already existed and overrideFileIfAlreadyExist is false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.ExportPages(System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports all PDF pages to a collection of Bitmap objects.
member.param: Scale factor for the exported images. Value of 1.0 represents the original size.
When true, overrides existing files if encountered during the operation.
The image format to use when creating the bitmaps.
member.returns: Returns a collection of Bitmap objects, one for each page in the document. These Bitmaps should be disposed manually when no longer needed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.Find(System.String)
member.summary: Finds the specified text in the current document using default search options.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.Find(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions)
member.summary: Finds the specified text in the current document using specified search options.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.Find(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition)
member.summary: Finds the specified text in the current document using specified search options and starting from a specific position. The search begins from the provided position and moves forward through the document.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
The text position from which to begin searching.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.Find(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextRange)
member.summary: Finds the specified text within a specific range of the current document using specified search options. The search is limited to the text content within the provided range boundaries.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
The text range within which to limit the search operation.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindPrevious(System.String)
member.summary: Finds the previous occurrence of the specified text in the current document using default search options. The search begins from the current selection or position and moves backward through the document.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindPrevious(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions)
member.summary: Finds the previous occurrence of the specified text in the current document using specified search options. The search begins from the current selection or position and moves backward through the document.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindPrevious(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition)
member.summary: Finds the previous occurrence of the specified text in the current document using specified search options and starting from a specific position. The search begins from the provided position and moves backward through the document.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
The text position from which to begin searching backward.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindPrevious(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextRange)
member.summary: Finds the previous occurrence of the specified text within a specific range of the current document using specified search options. The search moves backward through the text content within the provided range boundaries.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
The text range within which to limit the search operation.
member.returns: A SearchResult object containing information about the found text position or SearchResult.NotFound if the text was not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindAll(System.String)
member.summary: Finds all occurrences of the specified text in the current document using default search options. Returns all matching results found throughout the entire document.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of SearchResult objects representing all found occurrences of the text.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindAll(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions)
member.summary: Finds all occurrences of the specified text in the current document using specified search options. Returns all matching results found throughout the entire document based on the provided search criteria.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of SearchResult objects representing all found occurrences of the text.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindAll(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition)
member.summary: Finds all occurrences of the specified text in the current document using specified search options and starting from a specific position. Returns all matching results found from the start position to the end of the document.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
The text position from which to begin searching.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of SearchResult objects representing all found occurrences of the text from the start position.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewer.FindAll(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.TextSearchOptions,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextRange)
member.summary: Finds all occurrences of the specified text within a specific range of the current document using specified search options. Returns all matching results found within the boundaries of the provided text range.
member.param: The text to search for in the document.
The search options that control case sensitivity, whole word matching, and other search parameters.
The text range within which to limit the search operation.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of SearchResult objects representing all found occurrences of the text within the specified range.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement
member.summary: Represents the main element of the control.
Represents the main PDF viewer element that displays and allows interaction with PDF documents. Provides functionality for document loading, viewing, navigation, and printing.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RadPdfViewerElement class. Sets up initial component configurations, input handlers, and UI elements.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.CreateItemScroller
member.summary: Creates and initializes the item scroller used to scroll through PDF pages.
member.returns: A specialized PdfItemScroller instance to handle PDF page scrolling.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.CreateViewElement
member.summary: Creates the main view element container used to display PDF pages.
member.returns: A specialized PdfViewerStackContainer to manage PDF page layout.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.CreateElementProvider
member.summary: Creates the element provider responsible for virtualizing PDF page elements.
member.returns: A FixedPageElementProvider that manages the creation and recycling of page elements.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.CreateChildElements
member.summary: Creates and initializes all child elements of the PDF viewer including the waiting bar, and sets up default visual appearance.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.HorizontalScrollState
member.summary: Gets or sets the display state of the horizontal scrollbar. Controls whether the horizontal scrollbar is always visible, hidden, or only appears when needed.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.VerticalScrollState
member.summary: Gets or sets the display state of the vertical scrollbar. Controls whether the vertical scrollbar is always visible, hidden, or only appears when needed.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.FitToWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the document should be scaled to fit the width of the viewer. When enabled, the document will be automatically resized horizontally to fill the available width.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.FitFullPage
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the document should be scaled to fit the entire page within the viewer. When enabled, the viewer will show complete pages and use discrete scrolling between pages.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ContextMenu
member.summary: Gets or sets the context menu that appears when right-clicking within the PDF viewer. By default, this is an instance of PdfViewerContextMenu with standard PDF viewing options.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.AnnotationsColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color of the annotations when they are pressed or highlighted. This color is used to visually indicate interactive annotation elements in the document.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.SelectionColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color used to highlight text selections within the PDF document. This color is applied as a semi-transparent overlay on selected text content.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.MouseController
member.summary: Gets the MouseHandlersController which manages all mouse input handling for the PDF viewer. Controls behaviors like text selection, panning, and annotation interaction.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ScaleFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the zoom factor by which the document is scaled. Values range from 0.01 (1%) to 62.0 (6200%), with 1.0 representing the original document size.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.Document
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently loaded PDF document. Setting this property automatically unloads any previous document and loads the new one.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ReadingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the entire document is loaded immediately or pages are loaded as they're needed. This affects memory usage and initial loading performance of large documents.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.PrintScalePageToPaperSize
member.summary: Gets or sets whether pages are scaled during printing to fit the paper size without preserving aspect ratio. When enabled, pages will be stretched or compressed to fill the entire printable area.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.PrintOrientation
member.summary: Gets or sets the page orientation used when printing the document. Can be set to Portrait, Landscape, or Auto (determines orientation based on page content).

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.AllowSignatureDialog
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the signature verification dialog should be displayed when encountering digital signatures. When disabled, signature verification information will not be shown to the user.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.AllowSignSignatureDialog
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the dialog for adding new digital signatures should be displayed. When disabled, users will not be able to sign documents through the standard dialog.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.EnableAISummary
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AI-generated summaries are enabled. When set to true the must be assigned to generate summaries and answer questions.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.AISummaryModel
member.summary: Gets or sets the model for AI-powered summaries and chat messages.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.SummaryProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the summary provider used for generating summaries and answering questions.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetFocusedPage
member.summary: Gets the page element which contains the text caret when text selection is active.
member.returns: The RadFixedPageElement containing the caret, or null if text operations are not supported or no caret exists.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetPageElement(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedPage)
member.summary: Gets the visual page element which corresponds to a specific logical page from the document.
member.param: The logical page from the document model.
member.returns: The visual RadFixedPageElement corresponding to the given logical page, or null if the page isn't currently visible.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.LoadDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a PDF document from a specified file path. Unloads any currently loaded document and displays a waiting indicator while loading.
member.param: The full path to the PDF file to load.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.LoadDocument(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Loads a PDF document from a provided stream containing PDF data. Unloads any currently loaded document and displays a waiting indicator while loading.
member.param: The stream containing the PDF document data to load.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.LoadDocument(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedDocument)
member.summary: Loads an already created RadFixedDocument into the PDF viewer. Updates the view and initializes all necessary handlers for the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocument to display in the viewer.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetDocumentAsStream
member.summary: Gets the currently loaded PDF document as a stream.
member.returns: A stream containing the PDF document data, or null if no document is loaded.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.SaveDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the current PDF document to a file, including any changes made through form field editing or annotations.
member.param: The full path where the PDF file should be saved.
member.returns: True if the document was successfully saved; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.SaveDocument(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Saves the current PDF document to a stream, including any changes made through form field editing or annotations.
member.param: The stream where the PDF data should be written.
member.returns: True if the document was successfully saved; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ExportPage(System.Int32,System.String,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports a single PDF page as an image file on disk.
member.param: Number of the page to export (1-based index, first page is 1). A value of 0 exports the current visible page.
Full path where the output image file should be saved.
Scale factor for the export. Value of 1.0 represents original size.
When true, overwrites any existing file with the same name.
The image format to use when saving the file (PNG, JPEG, BMP, etc).
member.returns: True if the page was successfully exported; false if the file exists and overrideFileIfAlreadyExist is false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.MoveToPreviousEditor
member.summary: Moves focus to the previous interactive element (such as form field) in the document.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.MoveToNextEditor
member.summary: Moves focus to the next interactive element (such as form field) in the document.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ExportPage(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports a single PDF page as a Bitmap image in memory.
member.param: Number of the page to export (1-based index, first page is 1). A value of 0 exports the current visible page.
Scale factor for the export. Value of 1.0 represents original size.
Unused parameter in this overload.
Unused parameter in this overload.
member.returns: A Bitmap containing the rendered PDF page. This bitmap must be manually disposed by the caller.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ExportPages(System.String,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports all PDF pages as separate image files on disk. Page numbers will be appended to the filename (e.g., file-1.png, file-2.png).
member.param: Base path and filename pattern for the output image files.
Scale factor for the export. Value of 1.0 represents original size.
When true, overwrites any existing files with the same names.
The image format to use when saving the files (PNG, JPEG, BMP, etc).
member.returns: True if all pages were successfully exported; false if any file exists and overrideFileIfAlreadyExist is false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ExportPages(System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Exports all PDF pages as a collection of Bitmap images in memory.
member.param: Scale factor for the export. Value of 1.0 represents original size.
Unused parameter in this overload.
Unused parameter in this overload.
member.returns: A collection of Bitmap objects, one for each page in the document. These Bitmaps must be manually disposed by the caller.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetPageVerticalOffset(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedPage)
member.summary: Gets the vertical offset in pixels of a specific page from the top edge of the first page in the document. This value is useful for programmatically scrolling to specific pages.
member.param: The page whose offset should be calculated.
member.returns: The vertical offset in pixels from the top of the document to the specified page.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ShowMenu(System.Drawing.Point)
member.summary: Shows the currently assigned context menu at the specified position within the viewer.
member.param: The point coordinates where the context menu should be displayed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.InvalidatePage(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedPage)
member.summary: Forces a specific page to be redrawn in the viewer. Use this when the page content has changed and needs to be visually updated.
member.param: The page that needs to be redrawn.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.InvalidatePages
member.summary: Forces all pages in the document to be redrawn in the viewer. Use this when multiple pages have changed or when global document settings have been modified.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.BringIntoView(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition)
member.summary: Scrolls the viewer horizontally and vertically to ensure that the specified text position is visible. This is useful when programmatically navigating to specific text content within the document.
member.param: The text position that should be made visible in the viewport.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetViewPointFromTextPosition(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition)
member.summary: Gets the screen coordinates in the viewer corresponding to a specific text position in the document. Useful for positioning UI elements like tooltips or annotations at specific text locations.
member.param: The text position in the document model.
member.returns: A Point representing the screen coordinates in the viewer, or Point.Empty if the position is invalid.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.Copy
member.summary: Copies the currently selected text in the document to the system clipboard. If no text is selected or no document is loaded, this operation does nothing.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.Select(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Text.TextPosition)
member.summary: Creates a text selection in the document from the specified start position to end position. Also scrolls the view to ensure the start position is visible.
member.param: The starting text position of the selection.
The ending text position of the selection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.Select(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Search.SearchResult)
member.summary: Creates a text selection in the document based on a search result. Also scrolls the view to ensure the start position of the search result is visible.
member.param: The search result containing the text range to select.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.SelectAll
member.summary: Selects all text content in the document. This will select all readable text across all pages in the document.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.DeselectAll
member.summary: Clears the current selection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetSelectedText
member.summary: Gets the currently selected text content from the document. Returns an empty string if no document is loaded or if no text is selected.
member.returns: A string containing the selected text, or an empty string if no selection exists.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.GetSelectedTextAsync
member.summary: Gets the currently selected text content from the document asynchronously. This is useful for large selections where retrieving the text may be time-consuming.
member.returns: A Task that resolves to a string containing the selected text, or an empty string if no document is loaded or no selection exists.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.StartWaiting
member.summary: Displays the loading indicator to show that an operation is in progress. Use this method before starting time-consuming operations to provide visual feedback to the user.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.StopWaiting
member.summary: Hides the loading indicator to show that an operation has completed. Call this method after a time-consuming operation completes to remove the visual feedback.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.IsWaiting
member.summary: Checks if the loading indicator is currently visible, indicating an operation is in progress.
member.returns: True if the loading indicator is displayed and waiting; false otherwise.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.OnPanGesture(Telerik.WinControls.PanGestureEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles pan gesture events for navigation within the PDF document. Processes touch-based panning gestures to allow scrolling through the document.
member.param: The event arguments containing information about the pan gesture.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.OnZoomGesture(Telerik.WinControls.ZoomGestureEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles zoom gesture events for adjusting the document scale. Processes touch-based pinch and stretch gestures to zoom in and out of the document.
member.param: The event arguments containing information about the zoom gesture.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ProcessMouseDown(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes mouse down events to handle interactions with the PDF document. Handles right-clicks for context menu, middle-clicks for panning, and left-clicks for selection and navigation.
member.param: The mouse event arguments containing position and button information.
True if the Shift key was pressed during the mouse event; otherwise, false.
True if the Control key was pressed during the mouse event; otherwise, false.
member.returns: True if the event should not be processed further; false to allow normal event propagation.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ProcessMouseMove(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes mouse move events to handle interactions with the PDF document. Updates the cursor appearance and tracks mouse movements for selection and other operations.
member.param: The mouse event arguments containing position and button information.
True if the Shift key was pressed during the mouse event; otherwise, false.
True if the Control key was pressed during the mouse event; otherwise, false.
member.returns: True if the event should not be processed further; false to allow normal event propagation.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ProcessMouseUp(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes mouse up events to complete interactions with the PDF document. Handles the completion of middle-button panning and left-button selections or clicks.
member.param: The mouse event arguments containing position and button information.
True if the Shift key was pressed during the mouse event; otherwise, false.
True if the Control key was pressed during the mouse event; otherwise, false.
member.returns: True if the event should not be processed further; false to allow normal event propagation.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadPdfViewerElement.ProcessMouseWheel(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes mouse wheel events to handle zooming and scrolling in the PDF document. When Control key is pressed, zooms in or out; otherwise, scrolls the document vertically.

member.returns: True if the event should not be processed further; false to allow normal event propagation.

member.summary: Processes the CaptureLost event that occurs when the element loses mouse capture. This ensures that any ongoing mouse operations are properly terminated.
